ABOUT.TITLE: About ArenaGym
ABOUT.MISSION_DESC: To transform fitness goals into real, lasting results by providing expert guidance, a supportive community, and top-tier facilities.
ABOUT.VISION_DESC: To be the ultimate destination where passion, discipline, and results come together daily for every member.
ABOUT.VALUE_1_DESC: Certified & experienced trainers dedicated to your personal growth.
ABOUT.VALUE_2_DESC: A motivating, inclusive, and supportive environment for all fitness levels.
ABOUT.VALUE_3_DESC: Modern, high-quality equipment and scientifically proven training methods.

memberProfile.tipText: Stay hydrated! Drink at least 8 glasses of water daily for optimal performance.
